name: Tile Match Puzzle Game
description: Are you looking for a new match-3 game? Do you want to find relaxation and joy in it? Prepare to embark on the enchanting world of Tile Explorer, the relaxing match puzzle game that transforms the act of tile matching into an art form. With each level, Tile Explorer invites you to immerse yourself in a puzzle-solving fun, where each tile holds the potential for both challenge and triumph!
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
